canonical_name: the handsomest man she had seen in many a long year
the only person alive who had real influence with Gwydion
no one alive to whose counsel Gwydion would listen
a fool full of his own importance
all the men in the kingdom
the only person in this household with whom she spoke from time to time as one adult to another
one of those old Caesars reborn
such a son as should make his father proud
the richest of his subject kings
everyone who ate at the high table
one of the bams where he had been doctoring a sick pony
servants in the garb of Avalon
the front yard to welcome the riders
one of those who consorted with oaks
another woman stepped from the sedan chair
a child of the oak groves-
the only one except myself dwelling upon Avalon who is of the old royal blood
